summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “What is Jupiter?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text: Jupiter is a third-party exchange aggregator on the Solana blockchain, offering a wide range of tokens and the best route discovery between token pairs. Learn more by visiting the official Jupiter Aggregator FAQ.
